name: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp.
business: Nevada Canyon Gold Corp. is an exploration-stage company that acquires passive interests in mining properties, including royalties, streams, and similar interests, and also holds exploration projects. The company's material property interests consist of the Loman Property and the Agai-Pah Property in Nevada, and the Belshazzar Property in Idaho. The company has no current revenues from operations.
sellsTo: No current revenues; potential future revenue from royalties on mineral production

exposures.sentence: Our material property interests consist of the Loman Property and the Agai-Pah Property, which are located in Nevada and the Belshazzar Property, which is located in Idaho.
We own passive interests in mining properties, and it is difficult if not impossible for us to ensure properties are developed or operated in our best interest.
